name: chrI_R_telomere
description: R-arm telomere of C. elegans chromosome I. C. elegans telomeres are tandem arrays of the hexameric TTAGGC repeat (CCTAAG/GCCTAA on the complement); mean telomere length in N2 wild-type is ~4-9 kb but varies 2-15 kb between strains. The subtelomere immediately interior carries strain-variable TAS-like repeats and is enriched for non-LTR retrotransposons. WBcel235 represents the telomere as ~10 kb of nominal sequence at each chromosome end; the actual array length is strain- and animal-specific.
expected_copy_count: 300-2500 tandem TTAGGC hexamers (~2-15 kb of array) per chromosome end
